Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 518 upvotes, 69 comments
  2. FrameBook 471 upvotes, 79 comments
  3. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 132 upvotes, 18 comments
  4. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 670 upvotes, 160 comments
  5. Segagaga Has Been Translated into English 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  6. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 213 upvotes, 51 comments
  7. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 104 upvotes, 23 comments
  8. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 187 upvotes, 60 comments
  9. The Window Chrome of Our Discontent 25 upvotes, 4 comments
  10. How the Sriracha guys screwed over their supplier 287 upvotes, 116 comments
  11. Ireland shuts last coal plant, becomes 15th coal-free country in Europe (2025) 294 upvotes, 130 comments
  12. I made a programming language with M&Ms 98 upvotes, 37 comments
  13. Fontcrafter: Turn Your Handwriting into a Real Font 142 upvotes, 60 comments
  14. FFmpeg at Meta: Media Processing at Scale 29 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. We Stopped Using the Mathematics That Works 61 upvotes, 23 comments
  16. I love email (2023) 70 upvotes, 30 comments
  17. Owner of ICE detention facility sees big opportunity in AI man camps 68 upvotes, 35 comments
  18. Show HN: Mcp2cli – One CLI for every API, 96-99% fewer tokens than native MCP 121 upvotes, 71 comments
  19. Unlocking Python's Cores:Energy Implications of Removing the GIL 51 upvotes, 25 comments
  20. My Homelab Setup 276 upvotes, 183 comments
  21. Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI-Assisted Developer 27 upvotes, 11 comments
  22. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 262 upvotes, 183 comments
  23. Ask HN: How to be alone? 549 upvotes, 408 comments
  24. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 226 upvotes, 160 comments
  25. US Court of Appeals: TOS may be updated by email, use can imply consent [pdf] 324 upvotes, 240 comments
  26. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 218 upvotes, 209 comments
  27. My “grand vision” for Rust 224 upvotes, 220 comments
  28. Nvidia backs AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6B valuation 33 upvotes, 30 comments
  29. Python's Lazy Imports: Why It Took Three Years and Two Attempts 4 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 203 upvotes, 720 comments

Last generated 10:00pm, 9 March 2026. Source here.
